Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Deem Truth Of Fats And Genuiness Of Documents Admitted, Monetary Sanctions; Compel Responses To And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ilene m. Hochstein, Attorney at Law, appearing for defendants Telephone 650-877-8288;
No other appearance.

DEFENDANTS AGNES FLORENDO, ALICIA ATIENZA, PHOENIX HOLDINGS GROUP, INC., STATEWIDE REALTY & FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.'S Motion To Deem Truth Of Fats And Genuiness Of Documents Admitted, Monetary Sanctions; Compel Responses To And Production Of Documents. NO OPPOSITION FILED and is GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1) PLAINTIFFS MUST WITHIN FIVE (5) DAYS FROM THE ORDER SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL ANC COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO EACH REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF FACTS AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY EACH FACT WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND THE GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS ESTABLISHED. PLAINTIFF WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM CHALLENGING ANY SUCH FACT OR THE GENUINES OF ANY SUCH DOCUMENT AT THE TRIAL OF THIS MATTER.

(2) PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PROVIDE, WITHOUT OBJECTION, ALL DOCUMENTS CALLED FOR IN DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.

(3) MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL, PAYMENT OF WHICH MUST BE MADE TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
